name: Traptrip Garden
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>蟲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>惑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>園</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>その</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your Main Phase, you can Normal Summon 1 "Traptrix" monster, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) The first time each Insect or Plant monster you control would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. You can banish 1 monster you control; Special Summon 1 "Traptrix" monster from your hand or GY. You can only use this effect of "Traptrip Garden" once per turn.
eff: During your Main Phase, you can Normal Summon 1 "Traptrix" monster, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) The first time each Insect or Plant monster you control would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. You can banish 1 monster you control; Special Summon 1 "Traptrix" monster from your hand or GY. You can only use this effect of "Traptrip Garden" once per turn.

attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
misc: Gain this effect once per turn
